title: Fahrplan: Bus 12
instructions: Lesen Sie die Texte und die Aufgaben. Wählen Sie die richtige Lösung a, b oder c.

passage.text_de:
Buslinie 12 – Richtung Hauptbahnhof
Montag bis Freitag: alle 10 Minuten (6:00 – 22:00 Uhr)
Samstag: alle 15 Minuten (7:00 – 22:00 Uhr)
Sonntag: alle 30 Minuten (8:00 – 20:00 Uhr)
Haltestellen: Marktplatz – Schule – Krankenhaus – Hauptbahnhof
Fahrzeit: circa 20 Minuten
Einzelfahrkarte: 2,50 Euro
Tageskarte: 6 Euro
passage.text_en:
Bus line 12 – Direction Main Station
Monday to Friday: every 10 minutes (6:00 AM – 10:00 PM)
Saturday: every 15 minutes (7:00 AM – 10:00 PM)
Sunday: every 30 minutes (8:00 AM – 8:00 PM)
Stops: Market Square – School – Hospital – Main Station
Travel time: approximately 20 minutes
Single ticket: 2.50 euros
Day ticket: 6 euros

questions.text_de: Wie oft fährt der Bus am Samstag?
questions.text_en: How often does the bus run on Saturday?
questions.explanation_de: Am Samstag fährt der Bus alle 15 Minuten.
questions.explanation_en: On Saturday, the bus runs every 15 minutes.

questions.text_en: How long does the trip take?
questions.explanation_en: The travel time is approximately 20 minutes.

questions.text_en: How much does a single ticket cost?

questions.explanation_en: The bus goes in the direction of the main station.

questions.text_de: Wann beginnt der Bus am Sonntag?
questions.text_en: When does the bus start on Sunday?
questions.explanation_de: Am Sonntag fährt der Bus ab 8:00 Uhr.
questions.explanation_en: On Sunday, the bus runs from 8:00 AM.
